mapper.insert: INSERT INTO personal_profiles (user_id) SELECT id FROM users WHERE id = #{userId} AND role = 'PERSONAL' AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, professional_title, desired_salary, work_type, location, career_years, sap_skills, core_competencies, summary, is_public, is_offer_available FROM personal_profiles pp JOIN users u ON u.id = pp.user_id WHERE pp.user_id = #{userId} AND u.role = 'PERSONAL' AND u.deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE personal_profiles SET professional_title = #{professionalTitle}, desired_salary = #{desiredSalary}, work_type = #{workType}, location = #{location}, career_years = COALESCE(#{careerYears}, 0), sap_skills = #{sapSkills}, core_competencies = #{coreCompetencies}, summary = #{summary}, is_public = COALESCE(#{isPublic}, TRUE), is_offer_available = COALESCE(#{isOfferAvailable}, TRUE), updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM users u WHERE u.id = #{userId} AND u.role = 'PERSONAL' AND u.deleted_at IS NULL )
